overview: A premium personal portfolio for Hembikram Bist — software developer. Features modern animated design with smooth scroll effects, upgraded hero section, project showcases, skills, experience, education, and contact information all presented with a polished, professional look.
features: Modern hero section with animated gradient background and profile photo
Smooth scroll-triggered animations on all sections
Interactive project showcase cards with hover effects
Animated skills badges with staggered load animations
Scroll progress bar and animated navigation
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
